User Story: Upload GPX/TCX/FIT and get a normalized route object.
Acceptance Criteria: Uploads parse; route polyline + distance + elevation gain computed; errors are actionable.

User Story: Connect Strava and import one of my routes.
Acceptance Criteria: OAuth works; list routes; select one; pull route geometry; store per-user token securely.

User Story: Connect MapMyFitness and import a route.
Acceptance Criteria: OAuth works; fetch route geometry; normalize.

User Story: See surface breakdown for my route.
Acceptance Criteria: Compute % by surface/highway classes with confidence notes.
POIs returned within corridor; dedup; categorize; compute distances.
Identify towns/transit/bike shops/shelters; provide nearest points.
Sample points; call weather API; summarize by segment; flag risk.

User Story: See active alerts affecting my route.
Acceptance Criteria: Pull alerts; attach to segments; show severity and timing.

User Story: See if my route crosses NPS/USFS/BLM/etc.
Acceptance Criteria: Intersect route corridor with PAD-US / Federal Lands; display land manager.

User Story: See cell-coverage confidence along the route (US).
Acceptance Criteria: Intersect corridor with FCC coverage layer; produce confidence bands.

User Story: See recent trail reports near the route, with dates.
Acceptance Criteria: If Trailforks approved, pull reports; show date + source; else hide feature.

User Story: See representative on-route photos for context.
Acceptance Criteria: Use Mapillary to fetch nearby imagery; select a small set; show source links.

User Story: See Strava-sourced route imagery where supported.
Acceptance Criteria: Prefer Strava images/metadata for routes/segments if available via supported API scopes; fallback Mapillary.
